Meridian Analytics is a data consultancy in Melbourne. We're twelve people, and since 2019 we've worked mostly with retail and logistics companies — the kind of businesses that generate a lot of data and need it to earn its keep.

What that means in practice: we help you work out what your numbers are actually telling you, and build the systems that keep telling you once we've gone. Sometimes that's a forecasting model. Sometimes it's cleaning up the reporting so your team stops arguing about whose spreadsheet is right.

We stay small on purpose. Twelve people means the person who scopes your project is the person who does the work, and the person who does the work is someone you can call. There's no account layer sitting between you and the people who understand your data.

Retail and logistics are where we've spent most of our time, so we tend to know the problems before you finish explaining them: stock that moves faster than the reports, routes that cost more than they should, demand that spikes when the model swore it wouldn't.

If your data has outgrown the tools you're using to make sense of it, talk to us.

I kept this clear of invented specifics — no client names, headcount-by-team, or performance figures — since none were in the brief; send any you want woven in and I'll place them.

**About Meridian Analytics**

Meridian Analytics is a data consultancy based in Melbourne. We've been at it since 2019, and today we're a team of twelve — analysts, engineers, and consultants who spend our days turning messy operational data into decisions people can actually act on.

---

**About Meridian Analytics**

Meridian Analytics is a Melbourne-based data consultancy helping businesses turn their data into decisions they can act on with confidence.
